narrative:
Perry 4 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,089 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
